Gemini Man (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $48,546,770Details
International Box Office $118,051,592
Worldwide Box Office $166,598,362
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,674,018
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $8,138,896
Total $11,812,914
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Henry Brogan is an elite assassin who is suddenly targeted and pursued by a mysterious young operative that seemingly can predict his every move.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,552,372 (42.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.36 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:29.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$140,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,642 opening theaters/3,642 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $63,386,397

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 11th, 2019 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: October 3rd, 2019 (Wide) (Germany)
October 3rd, 2019 (Wide) (France)
October 9th, 2019 (Wide) (South Korea)
October 10th, 2019 (Wide) (New Zealand)
October 10th, 2019 (Wide) (Italy)
Video Release: December 23rd, 2019 by Paramount Home Video
February 17th, 2020 by Paramount Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence and action throughout, and brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2589 (Cert #52305), 7/31/2019)
Running Time: 116 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Development Hell, Same Actor, Multiple Roles
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Assassination, Cloning, Hitmen
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Skydance Productions, Jerry Bruckheimer Films, Fosun Pictures, Jerry Bruckheimer
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
